objective: Implement ArkDeckCore domain models, the closed typed-step registry decode and the Job state machines with property tests.
deliverables: Closed WorkflowStep decode that rejects unknown kinds as destructive/unsupported.
Job/terminal state machines with the exact Core transition graph and property tests.
Compensation ordering that preserves the original failure classification.

verification.expectedEvidence: Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/workflow-journal-recovery/spec.md#AC-WF-001-01 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.

stopConditions: Any typed-step kind can be decoded below its Core minimum effect.
A terminal state can be re-entered or folded into another terminal state.
